overview: KOLARU AI 2.0 – For Students (UNGAL AI NANBAN) is a comprehensive AI-powered academic platform with 10 modules, an interactive 3D AI Robot companion (AI Nanban), and a full suite of content generators including a Prompt Generator, canvas-based image creation, video scripts, PPT, PDF, documents, and project builder for engineering students.
features: Interactive AI Robot (AI Nanban) with face-touch smile and body-touch dance animations
Robot state system: idle, smile, thinking, celebration based on user actions
New Prompt Generator page with templates for image, video, PPT, PDF, abstract, and document prompts
Canvas-based image generation with prompt-matched colors, gradients, and visual patterns
10 AI modules: Chat, Image, Video, Website, Document, PPT, PDF, Abstract, Project Builder
Deep Blue / Neon Purple / Cyan premium color theme
Floating AI assistant button with drag support
Export in correct formats: PNG, MP4, PPTX, PDF, DOCX
